config.title: Mail pracownika i klienta #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'std_choose_element_list_hli #include "50200"
'section_* #include "50222"
#comment ,> do likwidacji koloru
dim adresEmail:adresEmail="" dim mailCounter : mailCounter = 1 dim strZalaczniki : strZalaczniki = ""
private function add_chkbox(byref tb , byval mailCounter , byval strMail) dim hli:set hli = doc_.createhli() hli.prop(1) = strMail hli.prop(2) = clng(mailCounter)
tb.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX, -1 set tb.element.userprop = hli
tb.element.border = 0 tb.element.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = "" end function
function show_mails dim rs set rs = trans_.createadors("select stremail,strNazwisko,strImie from n5klient_pracownik where pKlient = " +_ #if appvar_settings_type = TYPEID_N5KLIENT cstr(page_.root.idObj)) #else cstr(page_.root.PRATF_PLATNIK.idObj)) #endif
dim pTBKli : set pTBKli = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(1)) dim mailKlienta
#if appvar_settings_type = TYPEID_N5KLIENT mailKlienta=page_.root.strEmail #else mailKlienta=page_.root.PRATF_PLATNIK.streMail #endif
ptbKli.newrow if (mailKlienta)="" then pTBKli.newcell.addtext("").element pTBKli.newcell.addtext("Brak adresu email klienta").element else add_chkbox pTBKli , mailCounter , cstr(mailKlienta) pTBKli.newcell.addtext(cstr(mailKlienta)).element.bold = false end if
dim pTBprac : set pTBprac = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(2)) pTBprac.newrow mailCounter=mailCounter+1 while not rs.eof pTBprac.newrow if (rs.fields("stremail").value=" ") then pTBprac.newcell.addtext("Brak adresu pracownika") pTBprac.newcell.addtext(rs.fields("stremail").value) else add_chkbox pTBprac , mailCounter , cstr(rs.fields("stremail").value) pTBprac.newcell.addtext(rs.fields("stremail").value) end if pTBprac.newcell.addtext( rs.fields("strNazwisko").value + " "+rs.fields("strImie").value ) mailCounter = mailCounter + 1 rs.movenext wend if mailCounter = 2 then pTBprac.newcell.addtext(" ").element pTBprac.newcell.addtext("Brak adresów email, pracowników klienta").element pTBprac.newcell.addtext("").element end if end function
function GetSelectionMode() GetSelectionMode = adresEmail end function
function CheckCheckBox() if page_.ctrl(1).body.row(1).cell(1).element(1).value = "1" then adresEmail=cstr(page_.ctrl(1).body.row(1).cell(2).element(1).value) end if dim i for i=2 to mailCounter-1 'sprawdz checkbox'a if page_.ctrl(2).body.row(i).cell(1).element(1).value = "1" then if adresEmail="" then adresEmail=cstr(page_.ctrl(2).body.row(i).cell(2).element(1).value)+adresEmail else adresEmail=adresEmail+";"+cstr(page_.ctrl(2).body.row(i).cell(2).element(1).value) end if end if next end function
sub rebuild_contents show_mails end sub
function fopen : fopen = true page_.enableedit = true if not page_.enableedit then fopen = false end if
#ifdef APPCONFIG_ZALACZNIKI_EMAIL select case trans_.var(APPVAR_MODE) case TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ZAL_ROW_BUTTON).hide = false end select #endif
rebuild_contents
end function
function fok() page_.result=clng(1) page_.goback end function
function fcancel() page_.goback end function
function zalaczniki : zalaczniki = "" dim pPage : set pPage = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=20618") dim nRes : nRes = pPage.domodalauto()
'idobj załączników zalaczniki = pPage.getIdDok()
'usuń maila tymczasowego dim idEmail : idEmail = pPage.getIdEmail if idEmail > clng(0) then dim pEmail : set pEmail = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5SENDEMAIL,idEmail) pEmail.listDokumenty.deleteall pEmail.markdel = true if not trans_.saveobjects() then end if end if
if nRes = clng(1) then 'wyślij mailem strZalaczniki = zalaczniki else 'usuń dokumenty if Len(zalaczniki) > clng(0) then trans_.execsql "delete from n5dokument where idobj in (" + zalaczniki + ")" if not trans_.saveobjects() then end if end if end if
end function
function getZalaczniki() : getZalaczniki = "" getZalaczniki = strZalaczniki end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
Email klienta
Email'e pracowników klienta
ROW_SEPARATOR(1)
QXE_BUTTON(-1,10,Dodaj załączniki,varFunction="zalaczniki")
ROW_SEPARATOR(1)
QXE_BUTTON(-1,10,Wyslij,varFunction="fok") QXE_BUTTON(-1,10,Anuluj,varFunction="fcancel")
QXF_END
